name: NextCure, Inc.
business: NextCure is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on advancing innovative medicines for cancer patients through targeted therapies, including antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs). Its lead product candidates are SIM0505, a CDH6-targeted ADC, and LNCB74, a B7-H4-targeted ADC. The company also has preclinical programs NC181 and NC605 for non-oncology indications.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that is focused on advancing innovative medicines that treat cancer patients that do not respond to, or that have disease progression on, current therapies, through the use of targeted therapies, including antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs).

catalysts.event: Phase 1 dose escalation data readout for SIM0505
catalysts.sentence: We expect to provide a Phase 1 dose escalation data readout in the second quarter of 2026.
We plan to provide a trial update in the second half of 2026.
